title: RSW Smart Choice Training Dog Treat Pouch Portable Clip On Drawstring Bag Ideal Obedience Walking Aid
features: Smart choice pet training treat bag - 1 supplied at random.

The smart choice training treat bag is ideal for carrying your dogs favourite treats when you are out and about on walks or trips. Its compact size is handy for portable use or even to keep in the car.

The bag features a handy carabiner clip that can be attached to a belt, lead or bag for secure fastening ensuring it is always ready to hand. The drawstring closure helps to keep the treats fresh and secure whilst giving you quick and easy access whenever you need.

Measuring 14cm x 14cm approximately, this little treat bag is an ideal compact size for portable use and travel, holding a generous amount of treats whilst out on your adventure. An essential item for any dog owner or trainer.
Please avoid adding a note to seller requesting colour as this will not be seen. Colour will be sent at random.
